subcodes.first_line: Say: O Concourse of the Bayán! The All-Merciful hath come with manifest sovereignty. This is the Day whereon all things have proclaimed the Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا معشر البیان قد اتی الرحمن بسلطان مبین هذا یوم فیه نادت الاشیاء الملک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation, @proclamation to people of the Bayan
